rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Memo is comprehensive; consider adding a short reproducibility checklist mapping memo steps to specific spreadsheet cell ranges for faster verification.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Include an explicit one-line budget arithmetic cell reference in the memo or spreadsheet showing max_budget - selected_cost to make budget compliance immediately visible to verifiers.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Recommendation table is present and clearly prioritizes O3. Cost for O3 (67600) is within max_budget (136800). rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: Validation burden described qualitatively without an explicit effort estimate; spreadsheet sensitivity scenarios could not be inspected directly due to parsing limitation.
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Add a short validation-burden estimate (e.g., person-weeks or number of test runs) and include at least one linked spreadsheet scenario that varies another relevant input or documents the sampling plan.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Memo contains a quantitative sensitivity check for crash_count (20/25/30% scenarios) which supports stability of the O3 recommendation.
